mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, email, phone, nickname, avatar, gender, description, order_count, player_type, club_id, status, create_time, update_time FROM user ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, username, password, email, phone, nickname, avatar, gender, description, order_count, player_type, club_id, status, create_time, update_time FROM user WHERE id = #{userId}
SELECT id, username, password, email, phone, nickname, avatar, gender, description, order_count, player_type, club_id, status, create_time, update_time FROM user WHERE username = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user( username, password, email, phone, nickname, avatar, gender, description, order_count, player_type, club_id, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{password}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{gender}, #{description}, #{orderCount}, #{playerType}, #{clubId}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET username = #{username}, password = #{password}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, nickname = #{nickname}, avatar = #{avatar}, gender = #{gender}, description = #{description}, order_count = #{orderCount}, player_type = #{playerType}, club_id = #{clubId}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
